# Enzymes allowed to carry no sourced methylation sensitivity (all three systems
# `Untested`) without failing the coverage-gate test in tests/methylation.rs.
#
# One enzyme name per line; `#` comments and blank lines ignored.
#
# Currently empty: every enzyme in the table has a REBASE `damlist` sensitivity
# row. Add a name here only after confirming REBASE genuinely lacks data for it
# (a scrape/parse miss should be fixed in ms_scrape, not allowlisted).
